turns.content: hey man. what do you know about restaurants in Memphis that are good for a date. somewhere nice but not over the top

Memphis has some great spots for that. A few that hit that sweet spot between nice and not stuffy — Flight Restaurant and Wine Bar is solid, good food and atmosphere without being pretentious. The Beauty Shop is another one, really unique vibe. If you want something more classic, Chez Philippe at the Peabody is upscale but it's a memorable experience. What kind of food are you leaning toward?
not sure. shes mentioned she likes Italian before. anything like that?

For Italian in Memphis, check out Catherine & Mary's — it's got a great atmosphere and the food is legit. Bari Ristorante is another good one, more of a cozy neighborhood feel. Either one would work well for a date. How dressy are you thinking?
I don't know man. nice shirt and jeans I guess. im not a suit and tie guy and she knows that

Then Catherine & Mary's or Bari would both work great for that. Neither one will make you feel underdressed in a nice shirt and jeans. Sounds like she already knows what she's getting with you, which is a good sign.
ha. yeah. been seeing somebody, her name's Lisa. it's still early so I don't want to jinx it
I hear you. No need to say more than you want to. Sounds like it's going well enough that you want to take her somewhere good, and that says plenty. Hope the dinner goes great.
appreciate that. yeah I just want to do something nice. we've mostly been doing casual stuff so figured id step it up a little

That's a solid move. Going from casual to a nice dinner out shows you're paying attention without overdoing it. She'll notice the effort. If you go with one of those Italian spots, maybe make a reservation — weekends can fill up.
good call. I wouldnt have thought about that. probably Saturday night
Definitely reserve for a Saturday then. You can usually do it online or just call the restaurant directly. I'd book it a few days out to be safe.
ill call em tomorrow. feels weird planning a date at 43 years old but here I am
Nothing weird about it. Everybody deserves good company and a nice meal, doesn't matter the age. You're putting in effort — that's what counts.
alright man. thanks for the help. ill figure out the rest
Anytime. Hope Saturday goes well. Enjoy it.
